download.description: Download a file from a URL. Supports {{placeholder}} template variables resolved from environment (available: hub_api_key). Host must be on the allowlist (*.ag3nts.org).

url.description: Full URL to download from. May contain {{placeholder}} variables (e.g. https://hub.ag3nts.org/data/{{hub_api_key}}/file.txt)

filename.description: Output filename to save the downloaded content as
